FOUR events amended:

(1) TdF stage 18 (Voiron→Orcières-Merlette) FINISHED — Richard Carapaz solo win from the break; Tobias Halland Johannessen (Uno-X) was in the break and eyed the win but was dropped ~4 km out, finished 5th (+1.57) — the year's best Norwegian Tour result. GC top unchanged: Pogačar yellow, Evenepoel +4.32, del Toro +6.51 (white), Seixas +7.11, Ayuso +9.22; green Mads Pedersen (477 p, +32 on Philipsen); polka Pogačar (70 p, only +1 on Paret-Peintre, KOM under threat); best Norwegian GC Tobias Halland Johannessen 13th. Verified 2+ sources (cyclingnews + cyclinguptodate + cyclingstage + VG). Stage-18 summary amended to the result; stage-19 'Nå' summary refreshed with the new GC line + confidence stage 18 medium→high. Stage 19 (Alpe d'Huez, Fri 24) start 12:00 UTC re-confirmed unchanged.

(2) CS2 100 Thieves StarSeries elimination vs Nuclear TigeRES FINISHED — 100T LOST 1–2 and are OUT of the StarLadder StarSeries Fall 2026 EU closed qualifier (lost both Group D matches; rain's tournament over). Verified 2+ sources (Liquipedia + GosuGamers + HLTV; individual map scores not published). Event summary amended to the loss. 100T live on in BLAST Bounty S2 (beat Falcons 2–1 in R32 22 July) — R16 Sat 25 July but opponent/time unpublished (bounty format), so NOT boarded; fetcher/verify/next run picks it up when BLAST publishes.

(3) Tromsø IL–FC Hradec Králové (EL 2QR leg 1, tonight 17:00 UTC) streaming RE-FIXED: the events.json row had been re-clobbered to 'TV 2 Play' by a pipeline build (norwegian-rights.js line 83 /europa/ -> TV 2 Play), contradicting its own summary prose (VG TV/Viaplay). Reset to [VG TV, Viaplay] — VG TV free via Nordlys/Amedia + Viaplay holds the Norwegian EL rights through 2031. This is the same unwinnable revert-war flagged at 14:55Z; correct only until the next build. Durable fix belongs to self-repair (split line 83) + verify (protect channel).
